race.description: Braceys My Coranna Maiden Hurdle (GBB Race) (Div 2)
race.comment: ONE ISLAND (13) now has a tongue strap fitted and been given time by Paul Nicholls after finishing third on latest outing three months ago. Could take a big step forward and sets the standard. AIMERIC (1) goes hurdling for the first time. Was a smart performer on the flat for Karl Burke and likely well schooled could be hard to beat. CHEAP SANDWICHES (2) represents a stable enjoying a fine season. Goes hurdling after three efforts in jumpers flat events. Needs more. NOWHERENEARMILAN (10) is one deserving of a second glance with a view to the future where she will find things easier in handicaps after this.
